title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Agricultural Produce (Grading and Marking) Act, 1937. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2***.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1948, for sub-section (2). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 25 of 1960, s. 2 (w.e.f. 27-8-1960).
